definitions.text: det å fastsette en viss (økonomisk) verdi
definitions.translation: the act of determining a certain (economic) value

definitions.text: det å gjøre et (omtrentlig) overslag over størrelsen, omfanget eller kvaliteten av noe
definitions.translation: the act of making an (approximate) estimate of the size, scope, or quality of something

definitions.text: det å tillegge noe eller noen en bestemt verdi
definitions.translation: the act of assigning a specific value to something or someone

definitions.text: gjøre seg opp en mening om et forhold, en tilstand, en hendelse, en utvikling eller lignende
definitions.translation: forming an opinion about a situation, condition, event, or development

definitions.text: det å veie for og imot
definitions.translation: the act of weighing pros and cons
